examples: The Pope has anointed him as Archbishop.
The archbishop has sounded a warning to world leaders on third world debt.
Archbishop Hunthausen also vocalized his beliefs that women and homosexuals should be more active in the church.
The Vatican's ambassador to Tanzania and the archbishop of Arusha were attending, but were not hurt.
Signatories to the letter included Costa Rican President Oscar Arias and Archbishop Desmond Tutu.
